name: Schlesisches Himmelreich (Silesian Pork)
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Dried fruit (prunes, apricots, apples, pears)
4 Fine pork chops or 1 lb lean pork steaks
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the dried fruit in plain water or cold tea for a couple of hours – or overnight if possible – to cover with juice.
2. Fry the pork chops in fat, turning them once, until they are colored on all sides.
3. Add the soaked fruit and soaking liquid to the stewpan.
4. Cover and simmer together for 30 to 35 minutes, or until the fruit is soft and the pork chops are cooked through.
5. Serve with potato dumplings.
Serves 4. Time: Start the day before; 10 minutes plus 35 minutes cooking.
